# Regex fixtures for skill: openspec-ship
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH lines pin the as.?built word boundary: wAS BUILT / hAS BUILT
# prose must not fire the SHIP-phase workflow skill.

MATCH: create the as-built record
MATCH: document the as built state
MATCH: archive the feature change
MATCH: run the openspec validation

NO_MATCH: explain how this hook was built
NO_MATCH: the session has built the parser
NO_MATCH: investigate the production outage from last night
